calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-04-2014 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-24-2014 Continued To Aug-18-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Appellant Audio Visual Management Group, Inc., Absolute Production Services, Motion To Consolidate Actions Of Case(S) Cgc-14-537503, Cgc-14-537506, Cgc-14-537507, Cgc-14-537513, Cgc-14-537517, Cgc-14-537520, Cgc-14-537525, Cgc-14-537528, Cgc-14-537534, Cgc-14-537535 With Case Cgc-14-537500.
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
John D. McLachlan, Esq. of Fisher & Phillips LLP, Tel. 415.490.9017, for appellant and moving party;
M. Colleen Ryan, Esq., Division of Labor Standards Enforcement, Tel. 415.703.4868, for respondents Meeks, et al.

RULING: The matter was discussed. Neither party contested the tentative ruling except as to the trial date. Per stipulation of parties, the Court modified its tentative ruling as follows: APPELLANTS AUDIO VISUAL MAHAGEMENT GROUP, INC. and ABSOLUTE PRODUCTION SERVICES' Motion To Consolidate Actions Of Case(S) CGC-14-537503, CGC-14-537506, CGC-14-537507, CGC-14-537513, CGC-14-537517, CGC-14-537520, CGC-14-537525, CGC-14-537528, CGC-14-537534, CGC-14-537535 With Case CGC-14-537500 is Granted, for good cause shown. The cases are consolidated for all purposes. The lead case is CGC-14-537500. The trial date for the consolidated action is August 18, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 206. Discovery deadlines will be based on the Aug. 18, 2014 trial date. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-537503, CGC-14-537506, CGC-14-537507, CGC-14-537513, CGC-14-537517, CGC-14-537520, CGC-14-537525, CGC-14-537528, CGC-14-537534, CGC-14-537535 WITH CASE CGC-14-537500
Off Calendar Apr-21-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. APPELLANT AUDIO VISUAL MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC. and ABSOLUTE PRODUCTION SERVICES'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-537503, CGC-14-537506, CGC-14-537507, CGC-14-537513, CGC-14-537517, CGC-14-537520, CGC-14-537525, CGC-14-537528, CGC-14-537534, CGC-14-537535 WITH CASE CGC-14-537500 is continued to April 22, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 21, 2014 at 9:30 am or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the Joint Notice of Motion and Motion, the opposition and the reply papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
